title: ReniDrags Molten Mayhem!
description: Explore the new biome that brings dungeons, dimensions, a custom boss, cool new custom items and of new tools!! Get on this mod baby!! Its super duper cool (source trust me bro)
body:
Welcome to **Renidrags Molten Mayhem** – a fiery new frontier packed with danger, loot, and super awesome challenges!!1!

Before the really awesome description here are some of the gameplay features!
Find the naturally spawning new biome the molten biome! Where you can find these new ruined portals! Use the lighter to ignite them to enter the Molten lava dimension! Theres so much enw stuff here, new trees, new structures, even new mobs! Find the new molten dungeons underground in the molten dimension and at the bottom summon the FURNACE KING!! To gain pandoras furnace!

To spawn the king just place one cobble one kings furnace heart and one furnace on top! The heart is found in the molten dungeon! 

Find the new moltenites too! Theyre really cool guys! 

There are new tools including the 3 new drills and the TNTickaxe!! 

Check it all out and let me know!!

But beware... King Furnace and his molten minions won't go down without a fight. Bring your best gear, your sharpest skills, and your courage – because this boss battle is no joke!!!!1111

This is not just a mod – it’s a blazing new adventure!! (source, trust me bro)

Reni out
